synced:
[00:11.86] I'm like the water when your ship rolled in that night
[00:17.39] Rough on the surface, but you cut through like a knife
[00:23.57] And if it was an open-shut case
[00:26.85] I never would've known from that look on your face
[00:29.68] Lost in your current like a priceless wine
[00:35.24] The more that you say, the less I know
[00:38.03] Wherever you stray, I follow
[00:40.72] I'm begging for you to take my hand
[00:43.98] Wreck my plans, that's my man
[00:47.57] Life was a willow, and it bent right to your wind
[00:53.24] Head on the pillow, I can feel you sneaking in
[00:59.46] As if you were a mythical thing
[01:02.35] Like you were a trophy or a champion ring
[01:05.14] But there was one prize I'd cheat to win
[01:10.80] The more that you say, the less I know
[01:13.86] Wherever you stray, I follow
[01:16.51] I'm begging for you to take my hand
[01:19.47] Wreck my plans, that's my man
[01:22.33] You know that my train can take you home
[01:25.28] Anywhere else is hollow
[01:28.11] I'm begging for you to take my hand
[01:30.94] Wreck my plans, that's my man
[01:35.31] 
[01:37.32] Life was a willow, and it bent right to your wind
[01:43.41] They count me out time and time again
[01:48.86] Life was a willow, and it bent right to your wind
[01:54.86] But I come back stronger than a '90's trend
[01:58.75] Wait for the signal, and I'll meet you after dark
[02:04.51] Show me the places where the others gave you scars
[02:10.98] Now this is an open-shut case
[02:13.72] I guess I should've known from the look on your face
[02:16.79] Every bait-and-switch was a work of art

[02:25.02] Wherever you stray, I follow

[02:45.20] The more that you say, the less I know
[02:48.19] Wherever you stray, I follow

[02:56.84] You know that my train can take you home
[02:59.71] Anywhere else is hollow
[03:02.57] Begging for you to take my hand
[03:05.41] Wreck my plans, that's my man
[03:09.12] Hey, that's my man

[03:28.06] Wreck my plans, that's my man
